channel.title: Spring Lake Surf Conditions — Remsen Ave
channel.description: Daily 7-day surf forecast for Remsen Ave & Ocean Ave N, Spring Lake, NJ

item.title: 7-Day Surf Forecast — 2026-07-09 to 2026-07-15
item.description: 0 IDEAL, 4 INTERESTING, 3 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days. Thu 2026-07-09: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 2.4 ft @ 7.0 sec, wind 5 kt SW, water 70°F. Low tide: 08:40, 21:52. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Fri 2026-07-10: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 2.2 ft @ 6.3 sec, wind 4 kt WSW, water 71°F. Low tide: 09:43, 22:54. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Sat 2026-07-11: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 2.0 ft @ 6.5 sec, wind 4 kt WNW, water 73°F. Low tide: 10:45, 23:52. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Sun 2026-07-12: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.4 ft @ 4.9 sec, wind 11 kt NE, water 73°F. Low tide: 11:45. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: period too short (4.9 sec); wind direction off (NE). Mon 2026-07-13: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 1.4 ft @ 7.0 sec, wind 6 kt ENE, water 72°F. Low tide: 00:49, 12:44. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wind direction off (ENE). Tue 2026-07-14: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 1.6 ft @ 6.6 sec, wind 4 kt WNW, water 71°F. Low tide: 01:44, 13:42. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Wed 2026-07-15: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.7 ft @ 4.8 sec, wind 8 kt WSW, water 72°F. Low tide: 02:37, 14:38. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.7 ft); period too short (4.8 sec).
item.content:encoded:
0 IDEAL, 4 INTERESTING, 3 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days.

  • Thu 2026-07-09: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 2.4 ft @ 7.0 sec, wind 5 kt SW, water 70°F. Low tide: 08:40, 21:52. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Fri 2026-07-10: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 2.2 ft @ 6.3 sec, wind 4 kt WSW, water 71°F. Low tide: 09:43, 22:54. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Sat 2026-07-11: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 2.0 ft @ 6.5 sec, wind 4 kt WNW, water 73°F. Low tide: 10:45, 23:52. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Sun 2026-07-12: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.4 ft @ 4.9 sec, wind 11 kt NE, water 73°F. Low tide: 11:45. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: period too short (4.9 sec); wind direction off (NE).
  • Mon 2026-07-13: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 1.4 ft @ 7.0 sec, wind 6 kt ENE, water 72°F. Low tide: 00:49, 12:44. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wind direction off (ENE).
  • Tue 2026-07-14: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 1.6 ft @ 6.6 sec, wind 4 kt WNW, water 71°F. Low tide: 01:44, 13:42. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Wed 2026-07-15: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.7 ft @ 4.8 sec, wind 8 kt WSW, water 72°F. Low tide: 02:37, 14:38. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.7 ft); period too short (4.8 sec).
